intro: Arthraxon hookeri, also known as Hooker's arthraxon, is a perennial grass species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues.
